scripts.build:demo: npm run clean && vue-tsc -b && vite build
scripts.build: npm run clean && vue-tsc -b && vite build && vite build -c vite.lib.config.ts && vue-tsc -p tsconfig.lib.json && vite build -c vite.codepen.config.ts
scripts.test: npm run build && vue-tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.app.json && eslint src tests --ext .ts,.vue && vitest run --coverage && playwright test
scripts.check:cdn: sh -c 'git status --short dist/lib; local_js=$(shasum dist/lib/index.global.js | cut -d " " -f1); local_css=$(shasum dist/lib/vue-table-suggest.css | cut -d " " -f1); remote_js=$(curl -sL "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/piTimes42eq13dot37/vue-table-suggest@main/dist/lib/index.global.js" | shasum | cut -d " " -f1); remote_css=$(curl -sL "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/piTimes42eq13dot37/vue-table-suggest@main/dist/lib/vue-table-suggest.css" | shasum | cut -d " " -f1); echo "index.global.js: $([ "$local_js" = "$remote_js" ] && echo IDENTICAL || echo DIFFERENT)"; echo "vue-table-suggest.css: $([ "$local_css" = "$remote_css" ] && echo IDENTICAL || echo DIFFERENT)"; echo "local  js: $local_js"; echo "remote js: $remote_js"; echo "local  css: $local_css"; echo "remote css: $remote_css"'
